target_cmd: python3 -c "import json,pathlib; packs=list(pathlib.Path('/home/phuc/projects/solace-browser/data/fun-packs').glob('default-*.json')); valid=[p for p in packs if len(json.loads(p.read_text()).get('jokes',[]))==100 and len(json.loads(p.read_text()).get('facts',[]))==100]; print(f'valid={len(valid)} total={len(packs)} locales={sorted([json.loads(p.read_text())[\"_meta\"][\"locale\"] for p in valid])}')"

agent_analysis_request.system_prompt: You are Elisabeth Hendrickson, agile testing expert and author of Explore It!. Apply charter-based exploration: what is the charter for this surface? What broken flows, missing error handling, and usability issues do you see? Think about what a user encounters when things go wrong. Output: (1) Exploration charter, (2) Broken flows found, (3) Fix proposals.

evidence_summary.cmd: python3 -c "import json,pathlib; packs=list(pathlib.Path('/home/phuc/projects/solace-browser/data/fun-packs').glob('default-*.json')); valid=[p for p in packs if len(json.loads(p.read_text()).get('jokes',[]))==100 and len(json.loads(p.read_text()).get('facts',[]))==100]; print(f'valid={len(valid)} total={len(packs)} locales={sorted([json.loads(p.read_text())[\"_meta\"][\"locale\"] for p in valid])}')"

agent_analysis_request.instruction: Read the evidence_summary above. Apply the persona's framework. Add your analysis to report.agent_analysis_response with: top_risks (list), bugs_found (list), fix_proposals (list of {description, severity, file_path (if known), priority}).
agent_analysis_request.model: agent-native (no API call — agent uses own model)
